Metadata.title: Equitty - Invest in Real-World Assets
Metadata.description: Revolutionary platform for investing in real-world assets with transparency and security.
Metadata.keywords: investment, real-world assets, fintech, equitty, investing, assets, finance

HomePage.headline:
The investment platform
for real-world assets
HomePage.subhead: Be among the first to discover how the future of digital investing is being built.

FeatureHighlight.title: Simple, transparent access to real assets
FeatureHighlight.subtitle: Blockchain-backed real-world asset opportunities with transparent pricing and instant settlement.

Toast.welcomeDescription: Start your journey with real world assets.

Benefits.title: A sharper way to enter real-world assets
Benefits.subtitle: The new landing keeps the focus on trust, speed, and access without changing how the product works underneath.

item1.title: Tokenization built for first movers
item1.description: A cleaner front door for investors exploring real-world asset participation.

item2.title: Fast onboarding experience
item2.description: The interface now emphasizes clarity, hierarchy, and quicker decision-making.

item3.title: Structured investor data capture
item3.description: Nationality, email, and referral flow remain intact while the UI becomes more polished.

item4.title: Brand system with stronger recall
item4.description: The visual language is more distinct, more premium, and closer to the reference design.

Testimonials.title: Invest with confidence
Testimonials.subtitle: Make Equitty your complete investment portfolio — one secure platform to manage, grow, and maximize your assets.

HowItWorks.title: The same waitlist flow, presented better
HowItWorks.subtitle: Only the UI changes here. Validation, submission behavior, and referral handling stay connected to the existing implementation.

step1.title: Choose nationality
step1.description: The current country catalog remains connected to the real form and validation schema.

step2.title: Enter your email
step2.description: The submission still goes through the existing server action without altering the backend contract.

step3.title: Add referral if needed
step3.description: Referral validation stays available inside the same form instead of being removed by the redesign.

step4.title: Join the list
step4.description: Success and error dialogs continue to use the current waitlist logic and translated messaging.

FinalCta.title: Ready to take control of your future?
FinalCta.subtitle: Choose Equitty as your unified investment portfolio — secure infrastructure, seamless access, and a platform designed for serious investors.

Faq.title: What changes and what does not
Faq.subtitle: The redesign improves the landing experience while keeping the operational behavior stable.

item1.question: Is the waitlist logic changing?
item1.answer: No. The same server action, validation rules, referral handling, and success or error flows are preserved.

item2.question: Will locale switching still work?
item2.answer: Yes. The new layout still uses the current localized routing and translations for English and Spanish.

item3.question: Did the referral field get removed?
item3.answer: No. It remains in the form and appears when the referred-investor option is enabled.

item4.question: Is this based on the reference design in newDesign/EQ-main?
item4.answer: Yes. The new composition, hierarchy, card treatment, and visual effects were adapted from that design into the real project.
